feed.title: [Research] Bitcoin After Block Rewards : preventing miner's deviation when the Bitcoin rewards is zero

entry.title: [Research] Bitcoin After Block Rewards : preventing miner's deviation when the Bitcoin rewards is zero
entry.summary:
In addressing the recent feedback on the paper, it is imperative to consider several revisions to enhance its credibility and alignment with realistic outcomes. Firstly, the title of the paper needs modification to better reflect the scope and nature of the content without overstating the findings. This adjustment will help in setting accurate expectations for readers.
Furthermore, there is a clear necessity to clarify the assumptions used within the analysis. It is advised to explicitly state that the assumptions represent a pessimistic scenario, which may not necessarily align with actual conditions. By doing so, the paper can maintain its analytical rigor while acknowledging potential variations in real-world scenarios.
The level of confidence expressed in the recommendations also requires recalibration. Since the study models a worst-case scenario, the conclusions drawn should be presented with caution. Emphasizing that the reality might present more favorable conditions than those modeled can provide a balanced view and prevent misinterpretation of the paper’s intent and applicability.
Additionally, engagement with critiques and feedback is crucial for refining the study. A thoughtful examination of the points raised in critiques, even if they are initially perceived as obvious or irrelevant, can substantially contribute to the robustness of the research. By addressing these critiques comprehensively, the paper can achieve a higher standard of scholarly work worthy of defense in academic circles.
It's also recommended to utilize AI tools for summarizing texts, particularly when dealing with extensive feedback or complex discussions. This approach can aid in distilling essential information and facilitating more efficient communication responses.
